form.formComment: Won two starts back over 515m at this track. Last start he finished 2nd over 515m at this track beaten 1.75 lengths (29.92) behind Digger Sure Can in a Grade 5 on April 10. Draw likely to suit. Ran one of the fastest times on the program last start despite finishing in the minors. Pay to follow.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened and checked through the 1st turn.

form.formComment: Steps up to 515m for the first time. Last appeared when second over 400m at this track a week ago. Draw will be an advantage has the ability to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at this track over 400m in 23.59. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 515m at this track at Grade 5 level. Has ability and looks a winning hope.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fourth last time out over 515m at this track. Hard to envisage a win.

formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fourth last time out over 515m at this track. Hard to envisage a win.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 1.5 lengths at this track over 515m (30.00) beating Pink Venom in Mix on April 10. Has hit winning form and can measure up again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Midway down the home straight on the final occasion glanced outwardly.

form.formComment: Didn't finish two back and couldn't make the frame last time when she finished 5th on April 10 over 400m at this track behind Larrikin Pioneer beaten 8 lengths (23.60) in a Grade 5. Hard to have this time.
